step.title: Load PRD and feedback
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/prd.md and the validation feedback from validate-prd.

step.title: Address each issue
step.action: For each validation issue, determine the appropriate fix: add missing content, clarify ambiguous requirements, strengthen acceptance criteria.

step.title: Update PRD sections
step.action: Apply all fixes to the PRD, maintaining requirement IDs and traceability.

step.title: Persist updated PRD
step.action: Write the updated PRD back to docs/planning-artifacts/prd.md.
